nasb.text: Now, therefore, please let your servant remain instead of the lad a slave to my lord, and let the lad go up with his brothers.

esv.text: Now therefore, please let your servant remain instead of the boy as a servant to my lord, and let the boy go back with his brothers.

cnv.text: 現在求你容許僕人留下，代替這孩子作我主的奴僕，讓這孩子與他的哥哥們一同上去。

ccb.text: 现在求你准许仆人代替这孩子做你的奴仆，让他跟他哥哥们回去吧。

csbs.text: 现在，请你把仆人留下，代替那少年作我主的奴仆，让那少年与他的哥哥们一同上去。
